name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || pip3 install --user uv; [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; [ -f pyproject.toml ] && uv sync; echo '✅ uv environment ready'

postAttachCommand.server: uv run streamlit run ui.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
